entities.description: Analysis of genome assemblies to provide insights into evolutionary events

entities.description: The structural arrangement of the genome in legume species

entities.description: The process of change in the genome over time in legume species

entities.description: The goal of enhancing agronomic traits through genetic analyses and breeding

entities.name: GENOMIC ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The detailed structural organization of the genome

entities.description: A unique trait in legumes contributed to by the expansion of gene families

entities.name: LEGUMEPEDIA
